expectations.text: Runs the ecosystem status check script
Specifically reports on the Tax PDF Organizer status
expectations.evidence: Dedicates a section to Tax PDF Organizer showing it is Running with LaunchAgent and watcher details

expectations.text: Specifically reports on the Monarch Money MCP Server status
expectations.evidence: Dedicates a section to Monarch Money MCP Server showing it is Connected

expectations.text: Indicates whether each is running, idle, or down
expectations.evidence: Tax PDF Organizer is 'Running', Monarch Money is 'Connected' - both clearly stated

expectations.text: Does not confuse status checking with configuration
expectations.evidence: Only reports status, does not suggest editing config files or changing settings
